title: cinnamomum rigidissimum
intro: Cinnamomum rigidissimum, also known as the stiff cinnamon or Malabar cinnamon, is a species of evergreen tree in the family Lauraceae, native to India and Sri Lanka. The bark and leaves of the plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cinnamomum rigidissimum include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain and digestive issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of Cinnamomum rigidissimum include tea, essential oil, and powder, which can be used to make infusions, topical creams, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
